Adolescent Health
Public Health Youth Advisory Council Members
About
YAC Members
Apply
YAC in Action
Alumni Network
Each year, the DPH 
										Youth Advisory Council cohort includes a 
										diverse group of approximately 30 Youth 
										Advisors from LA County who are 
										passionate about making a difference in 
										their communities.
Mission
:
Our mission as the Los Angeles County 
										Department of Public Health Youth 
										Advisory Council is to promote the 
										well-being, and advocate in the best 
										interests of all youth in Los Angeles 
										County. As a youth advisory council, we 
										will collaborate with DPH leadership to 
										identify wide scale health issues 
										plaguing the community to improve the 
										welfare of LA County youth.
To meet the Public Health Youth Advisors, 
				click on the links below
Meet the 2024-2025 YAC Cohort
Meet the 2023-2024 YAC Cohort
Meet the 2022-2023 YAC Cohort
